top_gap_prompt: What is the best customer success for customer success teams at mid-market and enterprise SaaS companies?
category_long: real-time customer success software for subscription businesses

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: ChurnZero's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: ChurnZero lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: ChurnZero's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best customer success for customer success teams at mid-market and enterprise SaaS companies?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How do I reduce churn with real-time health scores and automated CS playbooks without spending a lot on software?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a CS Manager or Head of Customer Success at a SaaS company reduce churn with real-time health scores and automated CS playbooks more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.
